infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SeeForMe uses the camera to detect obstacles and analyze scenes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SeeForMe uses the microphone to accept voice queries.

plugins.cameraPermission: SeeForMe uses the camera to detect obstacles.
plugins.microphonePermission: SeeForMe uses the microphone for voice queries.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: SeeForMe uses the camera for on-device obstacle detection.
plugins.microphonePermissionText: SeeForMe uses the microphone to switch to Ask by voice.
